productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men St Grp Blue T-Shirt
description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline and graphic print with branding Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This t-shirt shows off a love for individualism with its print. Wear this classic style to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair this tee with a classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
